PreToolUse.command: bash -c 'TOOL_NAME=$(cat /dev/stdin | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"toolName\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null || echo ""); if echo "$TOOL_NAME" | grep -qiE "execute|terminal"; then INPUT=$(cat /dev/stdin 2>/dev/null || echo ""); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qiE "rm\s+-rf|drop\s+database|drop\s+table|make\s+clean|--force|--no-verify"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"ask\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"Destructive command detected. Requires user confirmation.\"}}"; fi; fi'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat /dev/stdin 2>/dev/null || echo ""); TOOL=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"toolName\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null || echo ""); if echo "$TOOL" | grep -qiE "execute|terminal"; then CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); i=d.get(\"input\",{}); print(i.get(\"command\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null || echo ""); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE "git\s+commit"; then echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"⚠️ TDD Reminder: Have you run the tests? Execute make test or the relevant test-*.sh before committing.\"}"; fi; fi'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat /dev/stdin 2>/dev/null || echo ""); TOOL=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"toolName\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null || echo ""); if echo "$TOOL" | grep -qiE "create_file|replace_string|edit"; then CONTENT=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); i=d.get(\"input\",{}); print(i.get(\"newString\",i.get(\"content\",\"\")))" 2>/dev/null || echo ""); if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qiE "innerHTML\s*=.*\$|\$_(GET|POST|REQUEST|SERVER)\[|exec\(|shell_exec\(|system\(|eval\(|FLUSHALL|md5\(.*password|sha1\(.*password"; then echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"🔒 Security Alert: Potentially insecure pattern detected (innerHTML with vars, unsanitized superglobals, exec/eval, FLUSHALL, or weak hashing). Review security.instructions.md before proceeding.\"}"; fi; fi'
